TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alassane_Dramane_Ouattara, title = Alassane_Dramane_Ouattara, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alassane_Dramane_Ouattara} }

S.FORM: == Alassane Dramane Ouattara == ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Alassane Dramane Ouattara, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1942) mrhuw Cote d'ivoirie ta' misuw hya' ga Alassane Dramane Ouattara, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2010 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Alassane Dramane Ouattara mqwas biru sa Drexel pqwsan biru krahu. Alassane Dramane Ouattara mqwas biru sa Pennsylvania pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Alassane Dramane Ouattara maki tay kawas 1991 msqun ki Dominique Nouvian, tehuk misuw qani. mintzyuwaw nya Alassane Dramane Ouattara sa kawas 2010, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. 1972 kawas aring hopa pqwasan biru magal blaq ru hopa biru. 1991 kawas kekong. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Alassane Dramane Ouattara == ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Alassane Dramane Ouattara, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1942) mrhuw Cote d'ivoirie ta' misuw hya' ga Alassane Dramane Ouattara, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2010 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Alassane Dramane Ouattara mqwas biru sa Drexel pqwsan biru krahu. Alassane Dramane Ouattara mqwas biru sa Pennsylvania pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Alassane Dramane Ouattara maki tay kawas 1991 msqun ki Dominique Nouvian, tehuk misuw qani. mintzyuwaw nya Alassane Dramane Ouattara sa kawas 2010, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. 1972 kawas aring hopa pqwasan biru magal blaq ru hopa biru. 1991 kawas kekong. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == alas~ɕs~ɕane *ramane ouattara == rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, alas~ɕs~ɕane *ramane ouattara, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨote *ʔi*oirie taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alas~ɕs~ɕane *ramane ouattara, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja alas~ɕs~ɕane *ramane ouattara mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *rexel pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. alas~ɕs~ɕane *ramane ouattara mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa penns~ɕjl*ania pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. qnxan nja alas~ɕs~ɕane *ramane ouattara maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki *ominique nou*ian, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. mintzjuwaw nja alas~ɕs~ɕane *ramane ouattara s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. **** kawas~ɕ ariŋ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru maɣal βlaq ru ħopa βiru. **** kawas~ɕ kekoŋ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
